name: Lost Balloon
description: A kid's balloon is stuck in a tree outside City Hall and the whole block has stopped to watch.
briefing: Some poor kid is bawling because a balloon is snagged twenty feet up a tree. Somebody with a little **mobility** needs to shimmy up there before the tears turn into a whole afternoon.

name: Help Grandma Cross the Road
description: An elderly woman refuses to cross Cravens Ave without an escort, and traffic is backing up.
briefing: Grandma's parked herself at the curb on Cravens and isn't budging without an escort — someone **charming** enough to **talk her** across before rush hour turns into a parking lot.

name: Beach Clean Up
description: Torrance Beach is buried under a tide of washed-up junk before the weekend crowds arrive.
briefing: Low tide dumped a small landfill's worth of trash on the sand. Nothing dangerous, just **heavy** bags and a lot of it — bring someone who can **endure** the smell and the sun.

name: Sewage Clog
description: A backed-up storm drain is threatening to flood the intersection above Sewer Junction C-4.
briefing: Junction C-4 is backed up and about to bubble over onto the street. Someone who can **hold** their breath and **endure** the stench needs to clear the clog by hand.

name: Cray Cray Bidet
description: A smart-home bidet at Del la Monice has glitched into a pressure-washer and won't shut off.
briefing: Some idiot's smart bidet is malfunctioning and turning a bathroom into a geyser. Somebody needs to **disarm** the control panel with a little **puzzle**-solving before the whole building floods.

name: Superhero Squabble in Aisle 9
description: Two off-duty costumed heroes are brawling over a parking spot in the Del Amo Mall food court.
briefing: Two costumed idiots are **brawling** over a parking spot by the food court — someone needs to **talk them down** before the produce stand becomes a crime scene.

name: Talent of Torrance
description: The annual Talent of Torrance show at City Hall needs a chaperone before the judges start throwing chairs.
briefing: The Talent of Torrance finale is one bad joke away from a riot. Get someone in there who can **charm** the crowd and keep the **negotiate**-and-smile act going until the trophies are handed out.

name: Roast of Mayor Yao
description: The Mayor's charity roast at Granny's Donuts is spiraling as the jokes get personal and the crowd turns ugly.
briefing: The Mayor's roast has gone off-script and the crowd is getting rowdy. Someone needs to **charm** the room back onto the agenda and **negotiate** a graceful exit for the Mayor's dignity.

name: Fight at Crypto-Night
description: A crypto meetup at the Crypto Night lounge has erupted into a full brawl over a rug-pull.
briefing: A room full of angry investors just found out their coin is worthless and they're **brawling** over the bar. Bring **combat**-ready muscle, and someone who can **talk down** the ringleaders before this makes the news.

name: Museum Robbery
description: A crew is mid-heist at the Torrance College annex museum, and the vault door is on a timer.
briefing: A crew's got the annex vault cracked open on a countdown. Someone needs to **disarm** the alarm grid with real **puzzle**-solving smarts while the rest hold the line if it turns into a **fight**.

name: LARP Gone Wrong
description: A backyard LARP session at Madrona Marsh has escalated into real weapons and real injuries.
briefing: A foam-sword LARP session in the marsh got out of hand and somebody brought real steel — this is a genuine **brawl** now. Bring **combat** muscle that can **endure** a long night in the mud, plus someone sharp enough to **plan** a way to stand it down.

name: Blaze in the Burbs
description: A row of suburban houses near the Sardine is fully engulfed, with residents still trapped inside.
briefing: A whole row of houses is going up fast and there are people still inside. Whoever goes in needs to **endure** serious **hazmat**-grade heat, move **fast** through the smoke, and get everyone out before the roofs go.

name: Runaway Train
description: A freight train has lost its brakes at the Torrance Rail Yard and is barreling toward the platform.
briefing: Brakes are gone and a fully loaded freight train is barreling toward the platform. Someone needs to move **fast** across town, **chase** it down the tracks, and out-**puzzle** the failsafe before it derails into the yard.

name: Bank Robbery
description: An armed crew has barricaded themselves inside a Del Amo-area bank with hostages and a getaway plan.
briefing: Armed crew, hostages, and a vault full of demands — this one's a full **fight** if it goes loud. Bring **combat** muscle that can **endure** a standoff, and someone who can **negotiate** the hostages out before anyone pulls a trigger.
